query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `label_scan_settings` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `printerIp` varchar(128) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `printerPort` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 9100, `gs1Prefix` varchar(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `labelFolderPath` varchar(512) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT `label_scan_settings_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
